creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Jul 13 05:34:38 2013
New Revision: 322884
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322884

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.0
  
  PR:		pors/179907
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (freebsdports@chillibear.com, >2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/Makefile	Sat Jul 13 05:29:05 2013	(r322883)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/Makefile	Sat Jul 13 05:34:38 2013	(r322884)
@@ -1,28 +1,18 @@
-# Ports collection makefile for:	rubygem-sys-admin
-# Date created:				30 July 2010
-# Whom:					Eric Freeman <freebsdports@chillibear.com>
-#
+# Created by: Eric Freeman <freebsdports@chillibear.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	sys-admin
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.6
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
 MAINTAINER=	freebsdports@chillibear.com
 COMMENT=	Unified, cross platform replacement for the Etc module
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-test-unit>=2.0.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-test-unit
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-ffi>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-ffi
 
 USE_RUBY=		yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=		yes
 RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if ${OSVERSION} > 900007
-BROKEN=	umpt.h has been removed
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/distinfo	Sat Jul 13 05:29:05 2013	(r322883)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-sys-admin/distinfo	Sat Jul 13 05:34:38 2013	(r322884)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/sys-admin-1.5.6.gem) = 53b46b3d9a2ac615e0566a5070f7c06e9b19c61e8a28654cf39bffc6bd0c67e8
-SIZE (rubygem/sys-admin-1.5.6.gem) = 19968
+SHA256 (rubygem/sys-admin-1.6.0.gem) = 41bf07431e9915c73228e2ac148b3f96f3b55692935c3965a4ada3d10c571f26
+SIZE (rubygem/sys-admin-1.6.0.gem) = 23552
